mapper.select: SELECT id, challenge_id AS challengeId, user_id AS userId, status, challenge_amount AS challengeAmount, my_fee AS myFee, prize FROM ChallengeParticipation WHERE challenge_id = #{challengeId} FOR UPDATE
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM ChallengeParticipation WHERE challenge_id = #{challengeId} AND prize IS NOT NULL AND prize <> 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO Point (user_id, amount, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{delta}, NOW(), NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE amount = amount + VALUES(amount), updated_at = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM `User` WHERE email = #{email} LIMIT 1
